notes: Reproduced as reported. External-Dependency-Info.txt contains a libmicrohttpd entry (lines 1475-1988) despite the dependency being commented out in externals/skia/DEPS and absent from cgmanifest.json. PR #3463 (commit 7c74e2f0a) removed the dependency from DEPS and cgmanifest but did not update External-Dependency-Info.txt. The stale entry is present on main, v3.119.2 (latest stable), and v3.119.3-preview.1.1 (reporter's version). This is a trivial metadata cleanup.

libmicrohttpd entry still present on main branch. PR #3463 removed the dependency from DEPS/cgmanifest but missed this file.

actionability.reason: Confirmed stale metadata entry. Requires a simple PR to remove the libmicrohttpd section (lines 1475-1988) from External-Dependency-Info.txt.

workarounds: No workaround needed — this is a metadata-only issue with no runtime impact.

proposedResponse.summary: Confirmed: libmicrohttpd is stale in External-Dependency-Info.txt after PR #3463 removed it from DEPS.
proposedResponse.body:
Thanks for reporting this! We've confirmed the issue.

PR #3463 (commit `7c74e2f0a`) correctly removed `libmicrohttpd` from `externals/skia/DEPS` (commented out) and `cgmanifest.json`, but did not update `External-Dependency-Info.txt`. The stale entry remains at lines 1475–1988 across all current versions including `main`.

**Verified:**
| File | Status |
|------|--------|
| `externals/skia/DEPS` | ✅ Commented out (removed) |
| `cgmanifest.json` | ✅ Not listed (correct) |
| `External-Dependency-Info.txt` | ❌ Still listed (stale) |

This has no runtime impact but should be cleaned up for accuracy. A fix PR to remove lines 1475–1988 from `External-Dependency-Info.txt` would resolve this.
